title: helenium cuspidatum
intro: Helenium cuspidatum, also known as Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species native to North America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Helenium cuspidatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
